feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Cloud Applications Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Cloud Applications Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: how to get certificate to web service api
entry.content:
Hi

I created a WEB SERVICE
which addresses the URL: 

https://data.gov.il/api/action/datastore_search?resource_id=5c78e9fa-c2e2-4771-93ff-7f400a12f7ba&limit=999999 

This address is directed to receive data from GOV

When I run the call to web service 
I get the following error:
"<html><head><title>Application Server Error</title></head><body>\r\n<H2><b>500 Native SSL error</b></H2><br>\ nError is logged with Tag: {001cf7ff}<br><hr>Tue Jul 2 05:15:01 2024</body></html>"

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2748696 
I tried these steps:
https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2748696

Attached is a photo of the manual I tried to solve the problem
The question is for which URL do I need to create a certificate to receive the data required for SERVICE

what are the steps i need to do in order to get cartificate?
To which url do I need to create the certificate?
but without success to solve the matter
Do you have any idea how to solve this
I would greatly appreciate your help

entry.title: Create a table SAP Cloud application studio
entry.content:
Hi Experts
we need to build a table kind of view (table containing 3 to 4 fields as columns, allowing user to input free text) in Opportunity under a new tab can you please help with ideas how to achieve the same.

Thanks in Advance
Vijay V

entry.title: Post goods receipt for inbound delivery using ABSL
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am nearing the end of a development and hit quite a big obstacle that I havent been able to find a solution myself.

I want to automate the creation of inbound delivery, more precisely, I have a custodian goods return. 

I have 2 big problems that I cant find. 

First problem is how to use ABSL to set the Consigmnment stock flag ? This one is probably easy but I havent found the way to set it unforunately, no matter where I looked I can not find how to set this flag when creating an inbound delivery notification.

 

Second and probably the bigger problem Im facing is that I can not find a way to automate the quantity input and the target logistics are ID - those are the 2 things that the user inputs, other stays the same

 

Is there anyone whos faced similar problems and knows how to acomplish that behavior in the system ? Its imposibly hard to find where exacly and what happens in the system once the user selects a inbound delivery notification and pressess the button post goods receipt.

 

Please help, this one has completely destroyed my mental sanity...

Thank you

 

 

I was thinking of using the SiteLogisticsLot to edit the output material quantities and area, but only the

entry.title: Custodian Goods Return Notification Consignment Stock
entry.content:
Hey,

can anyone help me understand how to set Consignment Stock checkbox when creating a custodian goods return using ABSL

 

I sucesfully create a custodian goods return notification, but I can not for the life of me understand how to set this consignment stock checkbox.

Can anyone please help ?

entry.title: C4C Service Process- Multiple Registered Product
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a request from a customer who wants to include multiple registered products in a single ticket. Currently, when attempting to add multiple registered products manually, I can filter them by customer and ship-to address. However, is there a way to view all registered products at once and add as many as needed?

entry.title: Destination return 401: Unauthorized
entry.content:
Hello everybody,

could you someone assist me with this error 401: Unauthorized ?

I created a destination for my cap service. I build cap and ui5 apps by separate. 

When I try to connect from my app ui5 the destination does not load .

 

Best regards,

Angel Gutierrez

entry.title: Is Internal Communication (*.pid) always fired?
entry.content:
Is Internal Communication (*.pid) always fired or only when the fields defined in it change?

So if I have a PID from ServiceRequest to my CBO like this:

TicketID corresponds to Root>ID, and the field LastIntegrationStatus to the Z_LastIntegrationStatus field in ServiceRequest.

After the first change of Z_LastIntegrationStatus in ServiceRequest (or create) my CBO does not have the TicketID and LastIntegrationStatus values ​​and will be created.
During the next edition of ServiceRequest any standard field (e.g. Lifecycle status), if I do not change Z_LastIntegrationStatus, will the PID be fired?

entry.title: how to Integrate HID Fingerprint Reader in SAP UI5/Fiori and CAP in BAS
entry.content:
I am creating a web application with CAP and SAP UI5 using SAP fiori elements in SAP BAS and I need to implement the use of a HID Digital Persona U.are.U® 4500 Fingerprint Reader to capture a person's biometric data (fingerprint).

I have tried to integrate the use of the Chrome WebApi to connect to the device with the following code:

const filters = [
        {
            vendorId: 1466,
            productId: 10
        }
    ];
    
    const devices = await navigator.usb.requestDevice({ filters: filters }).then(device => {
        console.log(device.productName);      
        console.log(device.manufacturerName);
        console.log(device)
        var select = device;
        return select.open();
      }).catch(error => { console.error(error); });

But when I try to run it, it returns the following:

Does anyone know how I could solve this error?
or perhaps know of any other way to do this?

The WebApi documentation is as follows:
https://developer.chrome.com/docs/capabilities/usb?hl=es-419

And documentation on the use of the device on the web
https://hidglobal.github.io/digitalpersona-authentication/index.html

However, I have not been able to understand how to integrate this last one into SAP UI5

Thank you very much for your help!!

SAP Fiori SAP Fiori Elements SAP Cloud Application Programming Model SAP Business Application Studio SAP HANA Cloud JavaScript #UI5 SAP Cloud Applications Studio SAP Fiori Client SAP Fiori Cloud SAP Business Technology Platform SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment HTML5

entry.title: How to read structure field in absl?
entry.content:
Hello,

in my bo I defined a structure field and read AccountID from a PuplicOutport. 

I want to write EC_BusinessPartnerID_IN automatically in the field partner.

I tried it with aftermodify, but in this. there is no field for Structure.

Thats a new EC on BP. I want to fill column partner automatically with the partnernumber.

Thanks

entry.title: ByDesign Extension Scenario modify
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any way to remove the exntension scenario from my solution in Cloud App Studio?

I've made a mistake, i didn't check a checkbox in the scenario, but i have to use it. But this was found after the assemble and download.

Now it's impossible to modify the extension field and the scenario (Screenshots are from the patch version)? I have to duplicate it?

I need only 1 of these fields, but the "Rendelheto1" is not modifiable anymore.

entry.title: How to read/bind standard field in C4C to custom business object?
entry.content:
Hello,

I created a new custom business object and embedded component.

Now I want get the Business Partner ID, but I can only read it in the section group and not in the AdvancedListPane. Also I can not access the field in absl (EC_BusinessPartnerID_IN) because it is a structure field (read from inport). 

Has anybody an idea?

KR

entry.title: how to download codelist values from embedded component in c4c
entry.content:
Hello,

My requirement is to download codelist values with codes and description on click of a custom button on Embedded component in C4C. Please suggest some solution.

Thanks,

Anusha K

SAP Community SAP Cloud Applications Studio

entry.title: how to create a csv file with multiple rows and columns in c4c sdk
entry.content:
Hello,

I want fetch the data(multiple entries) from custom BO and download the data in csv format using sdk code. Please suggest some solution.

Regards,

Anusha K

entry.title: Standard Filter Options for a DateTime SDK field is not working
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

 

We have created a filter for an SDK field with Data Element "Global.BASIS : DateTime" however for some reason the Filter Options (in OWL screen) are not working aside from "Current year" and "Last 365 days" , other options does not produce any result. Any idea why is this happening?

entry.title: Recreate or Copy Screens using XML SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content:
Hi there, previously before PILOT version of SAC - SAP Application Cloud Studio we can easily copy screens from tenant to another by just selecting the screen OWL/QA and pressing enter we get XML code from which we can easily replace some settings like namespace etc to copy screens.

Since arrival of PILOT version when we tried to do the same it just opens the designer UI of that screen. 
How can we view the XML code now? PILOT version is received on August 2024.

#SAP #BusinessByDesign #SAPBYD #SAPBusinessByDesign

entry.title: check if object is locked by user ?
entry.content:
hi
Hello everyone

I register a withdrawal
and receives into the variable every SALES ORDER according to the parameters I chose

Right now I want to go through all the results obtained from the fetch
and check whether the record is locked by a system user or not

 

How to write such a code in ABSL

I hope you can send me a serial code example!

I want to verify a lock on the SALES ORDER object

entry.title: debug doesn't work
entry.content:
hi

 i am working in sap by design solution 

i finish devekope my sulution 

i moove it to the prod tenant 

now i have to do some changes in the solution 

so i created patch then i get a new solution in the test tenant in a ststus "in development "

 

now i want to debus this solution 

i set breakpoints 

and start debug mode 

i dont see any problem or alert 

but actually the code running not stop in the breakpoint that i set 

what can be the problem ?

i can add one more detailes 

the last action that i did in the first basic solution 

was to create a .bac file

 Could it be related to this?

what can i do now 

i must have the option to debug this solution

entry.title: Deployment failing for CAPM application when deploying to cloud foundry and HANA instance.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to build a simple application having data-model.cds and catalog-service.cds files in BAS project , i have performed npm installation as well have made necessary changes in package.json file still i am getting error while deploying to cloud foundry.

I have enclosed all the snippets of of my development.

Kindly suggest and help in resolving this. 

Thanks & Regards,

Ayushi Shrivastava

entry.title: How to update individual customer information in the SDK
entry.content:
Hello experts. I'm trying to update individual customer information through the sdk. Here's the current set of code that I'm using:

var updateCustomer = Customer.Retrieve(existingCustomer.InternalID);
var existingAddressInfo = updateCustomer.AddressInformation.GetFirst();
var existingAddress = existingAddressInfo.Address;
var existingEmail = existingAddress.DefaultEMail;

var updateCustomerCustomerCommon = updateCustomer.CurrentCommon;
var updateCustomerAddressInfo = updateCustomer.AddressInformation.Create();
var updateCustomerAddress = updateCustomerAddressInfo.Address;

// update address
var defaultemailbo = updateCustomerAddress.DefaultEMail;
if (!defaultemailbo.IsSet()) {
    defaultemailbo = updateCustomerAddress.DefaultEMail.Create();
}
var email = updateCustomer.AddressInformation.Address.DefaultEMail.GetFirst();
defaultemailbo.URI.content = this.Email.content;

// update phone
var defaultphonebo = updateCustomerAddress.DefaultConventionalPhone;
if (!defaultphonebo.IsSet()) {
    defaultphonebo = updateCustomerAddress.DefaultConventionalPhone.Create();
}
defaultphonebo.FormattedNumberDescription = "+" + this.Home_Phone;


// Update address
var address = updateCustomerAddress.DefaultPostalAddressRepresentation;
if (!address.IsSet()) {
    address = updateCustomerAddress.DefaultPostalAddressRepresentation.Create();
}
address.CountryCode = updateCustomerCustomerCommon.Person.NationalityCountryCode;
address.RegionCode.content = region;
address.CityName = this.City;
address.StreetName = this.Addr;
if (this.Postal_Code.IsInitial()) {
    address.StreetPostalCode = "00000";
} else {
    address.StreetPostalCode = this.Postal_Code;
}
address.AdditionalHouseID = this.Addr2;
}

The individual customer is updating but the text on the individual customers account isn't reflecting the change:

How do I update the text in the details tab through the SDK? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Change the file name of a Custom Form Template PDF (SAP Business ByDesign)
entry.content:
For SAP Business ByDesign I have created a PDI solution with a custom form template that is based on a custom business object.

The Form Template Header description defined in SAP Cloud Applications Studio is passed as the PDF name when I preview the form.

 

 

How can I change the file name of the PDF? I want to it to be my business object instance ID.

I would assume that this setting must be done in the .xdp file in Adobe Lifecycle Designer.

 

 

 

SAP has defined such logic for Sales Order Confirmations so when I save an output Sales Order Confirmation the Sales Order ID is included in the file name.

 

any ideas?
